user_system_path: Money-loop receipt integrity — terminal actions must not report success without a durable receipt
allowed_files_raw: Control-plane files plus the presence-action receipt helper and its message-action route test only.
forbidden_files_raw: No schema, no Slack transport, no UI, no cron, no dependency changes.
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npm run build
acceptance_condition: insertPresenceReceipt surfaces Supabase insert failures so the money-loop route returns an error instead of false success; proven by a red->green route test.
stop_condition: Stop when issue #348 has a merged PR with gate + build proof, or the exact blocker is posted.
next_command: Run gate:continuity + build, push fix/receipt-atomicity, open PR for #348.
